prompt: Create a photorealistic cinematic portrait using the uploaded person as the exact identity. Dress the subject in a tailored charcoal blazer over a black shirt, captured in a dramatic three-quarter profile with a calm, determined expression. Create a striking triple-exposure effect by keeping the central face razor-sharp while two semi-transparent duplicates appear on either side with smooth horizontal motion blur, suggesting movement through time.Use a rich crimson background with warm cinematic lighting, subtle rim light, and soft shadows that sculpt the face. Emphasize ultra-realistic skin texture, natural facial details, premium fabric textures, and shallow depth of field. Shoot with an 85mm lens, editorial composition, high-end magazine styling, refined color grading, and ultra-detailed 8K realism.
